blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,371 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
